rag.title: Enterprise AI Knowledge Base
rag.subtitle: RAG & LLM Integration
rag.value: On-premise or secure-cloud LLM integration that protects sensitive data, reduces hallucinations, and accelerates internal knowledge flow.

aiConsulting.title: AI Consulting, Training & Security
aiConsulting.subtitle: Adoption & Compliance
aiConsulting.value: From AI productivity workshops and enterprise security-awareness training to CEH-led risk assessments and system hardening aligned with TWGCB / FCB / CIS audit standards.
aiConsulting.audience: Teams building AI capability while staying compliant

productDev.title: Commercial Systems & Web Development
productDev.subtitle: Backend, Frontend & Brand
productDev.value: Brand strategy, UI/UX, technical SEO and high-performance frontend, plus scalable backend architectures, data models and operational dashboards — from MVP to enterprise-grade deployment.
productDev.audience: Companies needing custom platforms or conversion-focused websites

media.title: AI Voice Synthesis & Image Generation
media.subtitle: Generative Media
media.value: Custom voice synthesis for premium audiobooks plus an AI-assisted art pipeline for promotional assets, character variants, and brand creative.
media.audience: Creators, publishers, marketing and brand teams

case1.title: Large Educational Institution | Automated Scraping & AI Knowledge Base
case1.scope: Catalog ~100,000 scattered web pages and documents across legacy systems and connect them to an LLM-backed knowledge base.
case1.solution: Enterprise-grade scraper + ingestion pipeline that lists, crawls and audits assets, converting PDF/DOCX/XLSX/HTML into a unified, LLM-ready format.
case1.impact: Mapped the institution's full digital footprint and turned unstructured docs into a secure, production-ready AI foundation.

case2.title: Gaming Strategy Platform | SEO #1 & AdSense Monetization
case2.scope: Build sustainable organic growth and monetization for highly competitive keywords.
case2.solution: Technical SEO: Core Web Vitals, semantic HTML, schema markup, and mobile-first responsive layout aligned to Google ranking signals.
case2.impact: Reached #1 Google organic ranking and passed AdSense approval for a stable passive revenue stream.

case3.title: Infrastructure & Security | Government & Financial OS Compliance
case3.scope: Hardening, baselining and security assessment for RHEL, SLES, IBM AIX and other mission-critical systems.
case3.solution: Blueprints aligned to TWGCB, FCB, and CIS Benchmarks — covering configuration governance, vulnerability management, and audit readiness.
case3.impact: Materially reduced risk and helped clients pass financial and institutional third-party audits.

case4.title: AI Multimedia | Custom-Voice Audiobooks & Mobile Game Art
case4.scope: Support commercial content production with AI generative tech — validating market viability at scale.
case4.solution: Custom voice synthesis for premium audiobooks plus an AI-assisted art pipeline for mobile game promotional assets and character variants.
case4.impact: Audiobook hit #1 bestseller; creative production cost and cycle time dropped sharply.
